name: HTML Locate
purpose: Extract title and body content from HTML. Discard all platform chrome (sidebar, nav, footer, license blocks).
design_intent: Downstream stages operate on CLEAN TEXT, not raw HTML. Trafilatura handles boilerplate removal automatically — no selector maintenance. Title extracted separately via metadata API (needed for implicit name resolution in Stage 3).
change_impact: Replaces Cheerio selector chain approach. Output is plain text (titleText + bodyText), not HTML. Stage 2 no longer needs to run Cheerio DOM extraction.

implementation_tool.rationale: Tested: SharePlan 82,054 → 1,271 chars (98.5% reduction). Prices preserved (3-31 patterns per post). Auto-removes sidebar/nav/footer/license without selector maintenance.
implementation_tool.fallback: Cheerio selector chain (if Trafilatura fails or returns empty)

required_fields: titleText - string (from trafilatura.extract_metadata(html).title or og:title fallback)
bodyText - string (from trafilatura.extract(html) — clean plain text, no HTML tags)

python_bridge.interface: stdin: raw HTML → stdout: JSON { title, body, originalChars, cleanChars }
python_bridge.call_from_ts: child_process.spawn(pythonBin, [script]) with html piped to stdin
python_bridge.error_handling: On non-zero exit or empty body: fall back to Cheerio title/body selectors

trafilatura_config.rationale_tables: Ppomppu price tables may be in <table> elements; must preserve

cheerio_fallback.trigger: trafilatura returns empty string or throws

test_cases.name: Standard post (구독트리)
test_cases.expected: titleText non-empty, bodyText contains price patterns, reductionRatio >= 0.6

test_cases.name: Implicit name post (기프티콩~)
test_cases.expected: titleText contains '유튜브 프리미엄', bodyText contains price but NOT product name

test_cases.name: Trafilatura returns empty (fallback test)
test_cases.input: minimal HTML with only nav elements

acceptance_criteria: titleText populated (Trafilatura metadata or Cheerio fallback)
Fallback to Cheerio when Trafilatura returns empty
Test cases TC-0.1 through TC-0.4 pass
